authorized_batches.scope_summary: Batch A docs/evidence/archive-only moves under data/: audit evidence, generated planning data, historical/restructure/regression/refactor/analysis data, docs-like data, meta-data notes, and tracked logs.

deferred_batches.reason: content identity, pack/profile/bundle IDs, registries, and manifests need Tier 2 identity/projection validation gates
authority, policy, specs, security, and update surfaces need contract-owner and policy-demotion review
active tool modules need shim/import migration gate and stale-import static check
runtime/core/control/net surfaces require runtime ownership, build, CTest, and product proof gate
lib/libs surfaces are ABI/build sensitive and include a CMakeLists blocker

blocked_batches.reason: final exception/shim closure cannot run until prior batches are applied and proven

authorized_scope: Batch A only; apply safe subset behavior is mandatory
